session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Focus on whether lint and format checks pass now. Show any remaining failures.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check lint and format

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command has failed due to **Prettier formatting issues** in 2 markdown files. Here's the summary:
**Status: FAILED**
**Remaining Issues:**
Prettier found code style issues in 2 files: 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passing Checks:**
- Lint (ruff): All checks passed - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: PASSED - Exec reference: Up to date - Unit tests (erk): 5934 passed - Unit tests (erk-dev): 138 passed - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed
**Next Step:**
The two markdown files need formatting fixes. They can be corrected by running `prettier --write` on those files.
